3157810.name: 帰宅 -kitaku-
3157810.description:
I Just Want to Go Home — A Chilling Experience Awaits

A night where the ordinary turns terrifying.
You're just a salaryman... but the underground parking lot has other plans.

About This Game

"帰宅 -kitaku-" is a first-person exploration-based action horror game set in an underground parking garage.
After finishing your shift, your boss orders you to do one last task: patrol the garage.
But this isn’t any ordinary parking lot—it’s a place plagued by rumors of missing people and strange paranormal activity.

Armed with just a flashlight, you must investigate the darkness and face the unknown.
Will you survive the horrors within... and make it home?

Features

  • Immersive first-person horror experience

  • Explore a haunted underground parking lot full of supernatural events

  • A grounded story built around everyday fear

  • Short playtime (approximately 20 minutes to 1 hour)

  • Accessible controls — ideal for newcomers to the horror genre

Controls

  • WASD: Move

  • Left Click: Toggle flashlight

  • E: Interact

  • ESC: Open menu

Recommended For

  • Fans of action-horror and exploration-based gameplay

  • Players who enjoy tense, atmospheric short-form horror

  • Those looking for a compact but memorable scare

  • Action game players with around 50+ hours of experience (recommended but not required)
